raw_text:
Velocity Systems Inc.

Enterprise-scale platform infrastructure for the modern cloud era

PRINCIPAL FULL STACK ENGINEER

Austin, TX (Remote-first with quarterly in-office) · Full-time · $280,000 - $380,000 + equity

We're seeking an exceptional Principal Full Stack Engineer to lead our technical architecture and

strategy across the platform. In this role, you will define organization-wide technical standards,

mentor senior engineers, drive cross-functional technical initiatives, and make critical architectural

decisions that impact thousands of enterprise customers. You'll own the evolution of our core

microservices infrastructure, API design patterns, and full-stack deployment pipeline. This is a

leadership position for someone with 12+ years of experience who wants to shape the technical

direction of a hypergrowth SaaS platform.

ABOUT US

Velocity Systems Inc. is a venture-backed SaaS company that helps enterprises build, deploy, and
scale cloud-native applications with unprecedented speed and reliability. Founded in 2019, we serve

Fortune 500 companies across financial services, healthcare, and e-commerce. Our platform
abstracts the complexity of distributed systems, enabling teams to focus on core product innovation

rather than infrastructure management. We're headquartered in Austin, Texas with offices across
North America and Europe.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

Define and evolve the organization-wide technical strategy, architecture patterns, and best
practices across all platform layers (frontend, backend, infrastructure, and data)

Lead the design and implementation of complex full-stack systems handling millions of
requests daily, including microservices architecture decisions, database schema design, and

API standardization (REST/GraphQL)

Mentor and unblock senior engineers and technical leads across multiple teams; conduct
architecture reviews and establish quality standards for code, testing, and deployment
practices

Drive critical infrastructure initiatives such as multi-region deployment strategies, database
scalability, and cloud optimization across AWS/GCP environments

Collaborate with VP Engineering and Product leadership to align technical roadmap with
business goals; communicate technical trade-offs and risks to executive stakeholders

Champion adoption of modern development practices including TypeScript type safety,
automated testing frameworks, CI/CD pipeline improvements, and observability tooling

Identify and resolve architectural bottlenecks affecting system performance, reliability, and
developer productivity; drive optimization of React frontend rendering, Node.js backend
throughput, and PostgreSQL query performance

 Represent the engineering organization in vendor evaluations, technology selection decisions,

and long-term platform modernization efforts

Lead recruitment and retention efforts for engineering talent by setting technical vision and

establishing career growth paths for principal and staff-level engineers

REQUIRED

12+ years of professional software engineering experience, with at least 5+ years in a principal,

staff, or senior technical leadership role

Deep expertise in full-stack architecture including both frontend (React, TypeScript) and

backend (Node.js, REST/GraphQL APIs) systems

Expert-level knowledge of relational databases (PostgreSQL) including optimization, replication

strategies, and high-availability configurations

Demonstrated experience designing and operating microservices architectures at scale,

including service decomposition, async messaging, and distributed tracing

Proven ability to influence technical direction across multiple teams and mentor senior

engineers; track record of improving code quality, testing practices, or system reliability org-

wide

Hands-on experience with AWS or GCP in production environments including compute,
storage, networking, and security services at enterprise scale

Strong written and verbal communication skills; ability to explain complex technical concepts to
both engineers and non-technical stakeholders

NICE TO HAVE

Experience with TypeScript and React ecosystem including testing frameworks (Jest, React
Testing Library) and build tooling (Webpack, Vite)

Background in FinTech, HealthTech, or other heavily regulated industries requiring high
compliance and security standards

Experience with Kubernetes or container orchestration in production environments; familiarity

with GitOps deployment patterns

Contributions to open-source infrastructure or developer tools projects

TECH STACK

Node.js   TypeScript

  React

  PostgreSQL   GraphQL   REST APIs

AWS (EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda, CloudFormation)

  GCP (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL)

  Docker & Kubernetes

CI/CD (GitHub Actions, ArgoCD)

BENEFITS

Equity grant (0.1% - 0.4% depending on experience) with accelerated vesting for key strategic
hires

Comprehensive health coverage (medical, dental, vision) with 100% premiums covered for
employee and dependent coverage

 Unlimited PTO with a minimum of 25 days encouraged + 10 company holidays + 2 weeks

parental leave

Professional development budget ($10,000 annually) for conferences, courses, and learning

resources

$500/month home office stipend and equipment allowance for remote setup optimization

Annual company off-site retreat (international) and quarterly team-building events

401(k) with 6% company match and financial planning support

Commuter benefits and parking; subsidized meals on Austin campus; fitness stipend

HOW TO APPLY

Apply directly via our careers portal at velocity-systems.com/careers. Submit your resume, cover

letter highlighting your most impactful technical leadership achievements, and a brief portfolio or

GitHub profile. Selected candidates will participate in a 4-stage interview process: (1) Initial

screening call with our Talent Partner, (2) Technical depth discussion with our VP Engineering, (3)

Architecture case study with principal engineers, and (4) Executive alignment conversation with our

CTO and CEO. We review applications on a rolling basis and typically move quickly for exceptional

candidates.
